channel.title: Windsurf Blog
channel.description: Product news and updates from the Windsurf team.

item.title: Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with the full intelligence of Opus 4.7 and ~2.5x higher output speeds.
item.content:encoded: Claude Opus 4.7 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with the full intelligence of Opus 4.7 and ~2.5x higher output speeds.

item.title: Fast and Comprehensive Code Review, Now in Windsurf
item.description: Devin Review and Quick Review bring verification into the same workspace where you write code.
item.content:encoded: Devin Review and Quick Review bring verification into the same workspace where you write code.

item.title: Windsurf 2.0: Introducing the Agent Command Center and Devin in Windsurf
item.description: Ship more with local and cloud agents working together.
item.content:encoded: Ship more with local and cloud agents working together.

item.title: Introducing Adaptive: a smarter way to use Windsurf
item.description: We're launching multiple updates to Windsurf today: an Adaptive model router, a redesigned model picker with pricing context, and the removal of daily limits for Max.
item.content:encoded: We're launching multiple updates to Windsurf today: an Adaptive model router, a redesigned model picker with pricing context, and the removal of daily limits for Max.

item.title: Introducing our new Windsurf pricing plans
item.description: We're simplifying Windsurf pricing across Free, Pro, and Teams alongside launching a new Max plan for our power users. The new plans replace the current credit-based system with industry-standard quotas.
item.content:encoded: We're simplifying Windsurf pricing across Free, Pro, and Teams alongside launching a new Max plan for our power users. The new plans replace the current credit-based system with industry-standard quotas.

item.title: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, self serve users enjoy promotional pricing starting at 1x credits.
item.content:encoded: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, self serve users enjoy promotional pricing starting at 1x credits.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with Low and High thinking variants. For a limited time, enjoy promotional pricing on credit usage.
item.content:encoded: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with Low and High thinking variants. For a limited time, enjoy promotional pricing on credit usage.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking.
item.content:encoded: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking.

item.title: GLM-5 and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf
item.description: GLM-5 from Zhipu AI and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing. Both models are included in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena and Hybrid Arena battle groups.
item.content:encoded: GLM-5 from Zhipu AI and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing. Both models are included in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena and Hybrid Arena battle groups.

item.title: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark is now available in Windsurf
item.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark, an ultra-fast model optimized for real-time coding, is now available in Windsurf's Arena Mode Fast and Hybrid battle groups.
item.content:encoded: OpenAI's GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark, an ultra-fast model optimized for real-time coding, is now available in Windsurf's Arena Mode Fast and Hybrid battle groups.

item.title: Windsurf Arena Mode Leaderboard: The People Want Speed
item.description: We are releasing the initial results of the Windsurf Arena Mode leaderboard today — with some surprising upsets.
item.content:encoded: We are releasing the initial results of the Windsurf Arena Mode leaderboard today — with some surprising upsets.

item.title: Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 10x credits without thinking and 12x credits with thinking until February 16.
item.content:encoded: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 10x credits without thinking and 12x credits with thinking until February 16.

item.title: Opus 4.6 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking. Available in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena.
item.content:encoded: Claude Opus 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking. Available in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena.

item.title: Windsurf Tab v2: 25-75% more accepted code with Variable Aggression
item.description: We've completely rewritten and retrained the old Windsurf Tab, increasing accepted lines by up to 100% and introducing 2 new aggression levels on our new Pareto Frontier tab model.
item.content:encoded: We've completely rewritten and retrained the old Windsurf Tab, increasing accepted lines by up to 100% and introducing 2 new aggression levels on our new Pareto Frontier tab model.

item.title: Wave 14: Arena Mode - May the Best Model Win
item.description: Arena Mode brings side-by-side model comparison directly into your IDE, plus Plan Mode and Megaplan for smarter task planning.
item.content:encoded: Arena Mode brings side-by-side model comparison directly into your IDE, plus Plan Mode and Megaplan for smarter task planning.

item.title: GPT-5.2-Codex is now available in Windsurf!
item.description: GPT-5.2-Codex is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, enjoy discounts on credit usage.
item.content:encoded: GPT-5.2-Codex is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, enjoy discounts on credit usage.

item.title: Windsurf Wave 13: Merry Shipmas
item.description: Parallel agents, Git worktrees, multi-pane Cascade, dedicated terminal, and SWE-1.5 Free
item.content:encoded: Parallel agents, Git worktrees, multi-pane Cascade, dedicated terminal, and SWE-1.5 Free

item.title: GPT 5.2 is now available in Windsurf!
item.description: GPT-5.2 is now live in Windsurf! Available for 0x credits for a limited time (paid and trial users). The version bump undersells the jump in intelligence: Biggest leap for GPT models in agentic coding since GPT-5, SOTA coding model at its price point, Default in Windsurf
item.content:encoded: GPT-5.2 is now live in Windsurf! Available for 0x credits for a limited time (paid and trial users). The version bump undersells the jump in intelligence: Biggest leap for GPT models in agentic coding since GPT-5, SOTA coding model at its price point, Default in Windsurf

item.title: Opus 4.5 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: The most capable model in Windsurf yet, now available at Sonnet prices for a limited time
item.content:encoded: The most capable model in Windsurf yet, now available at Sonnet prices for a limited time

item.title: GPT 5.1, GPT 5.1-Codex, and GPT-5.1-Codex Mini are now available in Windsurf
item.description: GPT 5.1, GPT 5.1-Codex, and GPT-5.1-Codex Mini deliver a solid upgrade for agentic coding with variable thinking and improved steerability
item.content:encoded: GPT 5.1, GPT 5.1-Codex, and GPT-5.1-Codex Mini deliver a solid upgrade for agentic coding with variable thinking and improved steerability

item.title: Introducing SWE-1.5: Our Fast Agent Model
item.description: SWE-1.5 is our latest frontier model, delivering near-SOTA coding performance at unprecedented speed.
item.content:encoded: SWE-1.5 is our latest frontier model, delivering near-SOTA coding performance at unprecedented speed.

item.title: Cognition and Windsurf's Commitment to United States Government (USG) and Impact Level 6 (IL6) Deployments
item.description: Windsurf is ready to support IL6 deployments through partnership with Palantir FedStart, demonstrating Cognition's commitment to serving DoD missions across all networks and domains.
item.content:encoded: Windsurf is ready to support IL6 deployments through partnership with Palantir FedStart, demonstrating Cognition's commitment to serving DoD missions across all networks and domains.

item.title: Cognition (Windsurf) Named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for AI Code Assistants
item.description: Cognition’s Windsurf has been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for AI Code Assistants
item.content:encoded: Cognition’s Windsurf has been named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for AI Code Assistants

item.title: Windsurf Queued Messages Release
item.description: Windsurf now has Queued Messages!
item.content:encoded: Windsurf now has Queued Messages!

item.title: Windsurf Wave 12: Devin features in Windsurf
item.description: DeepWiki, Vibe and Replace, Dev Containers, and more!
item.content:encoded: DeepWiki, Vibe and Replace, Dev Containers, and more!

item.title: Wave 11: Just Keep Shipping
item.description: More tools for the Browser, Voice Mode, Checkpoints, and more!
item.content:encoded: More tools for the Browser, Voice Mode, Checkpoints, and more!

item.title: Our Commitment to Windsurf
item.description: What the acquisition by Cognition means for you
item.content:encoded: What the acquisition by Cognition means for you

item.title: The Next Chapter
item.description: Windsurf is joining forces with Cognition.
item.content:encoded: Windsurf is joining forces with Cognition.

item.title: The Next Stage of Windsurf
item.description: Entering a new era.
item.content:encoded: Entering a new era.

item.title: Changelist: June 2025
item.description: Windsurf updates from June 2025!
item.content:encoded: Windsurf updates from June 2025!

item.title: Windsurf and AHEAD Form Strategic AI DevOps Partnership
item.description: AHEAD is now offering a full suite of services around Windsurf
item.content:encoded: AHEAD is now offering a full suite of services around Windsurf

item.title: Our Brand
item.description: A visual reflection of how we want our users to feel while using the platform: LIMITLESS.
item.content:encoded: A visual reflection of how we want our users to feel while using the platform: LIMITLESS.

item.title: Percentage of Code Written
Wave 10: Other Announcements
item.description: A number of improvements to the enterprise offering and general UI/UX.
item.content:encoded: A number of improvements to the enterprise offering and general UI/UX.

item.title: Wave 10: The Windsurf Browser
item.description: Our new browser surface for maximum implicit context understanding and flow awareness.
item.content:encoded: Our new browser surface for maximum implicit context understanding and flow awareness.

item.title: Wave 10: Planning Mode
item.description: A native way to collaborate with the AI on longer, more complex tasks.
item.content:encoded: A native way to collaborate with the AI on longer, more complex tasks.

item.title: athenahealth Advances Healthcare Innovation with Windsurf
item.description: athenahealth uses Windsurf to accelerate their developers.
item.content:encoded: athenahealth uses Windsurf to accelerate their developers.

item.title: Changelist: May 2025
item.description: Windsurf updates from May 2025!
item.content:encoded: Windsurf updates from May 2025!

item.title: Statement on Anthropic Model Availability
item.description: Anthropic deciding to cut off capacity does not change our commitment to providing the best product for our users.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic deciding to cut off capacity does not change our commitment to providing the best product for our users.

item.title: An Inflection Point for U.S. Government
item.description: Windsurf is uniquely positioned to address the U.S. Government’s challenges
item.content:encoded: Windsurf is uniquely positioned to address the U.S. Government’s challenges

item.title: Windsurf Fuels Mercado Libre’s Growth Strategy
item.description: Mercado Libre uses Windsurf to accelerate their developers.
item.content:encoded: Mercado Libre uses Windsurf to accelerate their developers.

item.title: SWE-1: Our First Frontier Models
item.description: Introducing our first Frontier Models!
item.content:encoded: Introducing our first Frontier Models!

item.title: Self-Hosted Deployment Maintenance Mode
item.description: We have decided to place our self-hosted offering in maintenance mode, and offer a new single-tenant hosted offering that can expose our agentic capabilities.
item.content:encoded: We have decided to place our self-hosted offering in maintenance mode, and offer a new single-tenant hosted offering that can expose our agentic capabilities.

item.title: Wave 8: UX Features + Plugins Update
item.description: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 3 of 3.
item.content:encoded: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 3 of 3.

item.title: Wave 8: Cascade Customization Features
item.description: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 2 of 3.
item.content:encoded: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 2 of 3.

item.title: Windsurf Wave 8: Teams & Enterprise Features
item.description: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 1 of 3.
item.content:encoded: Introducing Wave 8, our biggest batch of updates yet! This is part 1 of 3.

item.title: Changelist: April 2025
item.description: Windsurf updates from April 2025!
item.content:encoded: Windsurf updates from April 2025!

item.title: An Update to Our Free Plan
item.description: The Free Tier is getting an upgrade!
item.content:encoded: The Free Tier is getting an upgrade!

item.title: An Update to Our Pricing
item.description: Our pricing model is getting much simpler!
item.content:encoded: Our pricing model is getting much simpler!

item.title: Changelist: March 2025
item.description: Codeium updates from March 2025!
item.content:encoded: Codeium updates from March 2025!
